name: StreamNotify
short: Post live stream and clip notifications for YouTube, Twitch, Kick and TikTok.
description: Users with a required role can DM the bot to register their streaming channels. The bot polls each registered channel every 2 minutes and posts an embed notification in a configured channel when someone goes live or uploads a new clip.
install_msg:
Thanks for installing StreamNotify!

Setup steps:
1. `[p]streamnotify setchannel #your-channel`
2. `[p]streamnotify setrole @StreamerRole`
3. `[p]streamnotify settwitch <client_id> <client_secret>` (optional)
4. `[p]streamnotify setyoutube <api_key>` (optional)

Streamers then DM the bot with: `add twitch <username>`
author: Your Name
